headline: Berkshire Hathaway Likely Made a Lot of Portfolio Changes in the First Quarter
summary: Investors will soon learn what changes Berkshire Hathaway made to its equity portfolio in the first quarter—and the company’s smaller holdings probably were impacted.

raw.headline: Berkshire Hathaway Likely Made a Lot of Portfolio Changes in the First Quarter

headline: Maryland is moving to ban companies like Walmart and Kroger from ‘surveillance pricing’ — what it is and how to avoid it
summary: Where you live, your ethnicity and what you search can completely change the price you pay.
